zh.lifeSummary: 當Katharine FitzAlan於1300年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，她的父親Brian FitzAlan40歲，母親Maud de Balliol40歲。她於1317年12月27日之前與John Grey結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年8月7日在英國越可爾約克享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Katharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Katherine , associated by folk etymology with Greek katharos ‘pure’. This is the preferred spelling in Germany. It is also the one used in the name of the American film star Katharine Hepburn ( 1907–2003 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Katharine FitzAlan was born in 1300, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, her father, Brian FitzAlan, was 40 and her mother, Maud de Balliol, was 40. She married John Grey before 27 December 1317. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 7 August 1328, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katharine FitzAlan est née en 1300, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Brian FitzAlan, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud de Balliol, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé John Grey avant 27 décembre 1317. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1328, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Katharine FitzAlan(이)가 1300년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Brian FitzAlan(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Balliol(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1317년 12월 27일 이전 John Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 8월 7일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katharine FitzAlan родилась в 1300 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Brian FitzAlan было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Balliol, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Grey перед 27 декабрь 1317 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 августа 1328 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
